title: 买菜讲价
description_uz: «To'rt yuan-u besh mao qimmat-ku?» — bozorda xaridor va sotuvchining narx kelishishi. Bu muloqotda narx so'rash, sifat haqida bahslashish, arzonlatishni so'rash va yakuniy hisobni chiqarish mashq qilinadi. Pomidor, tuxum va go'sht atrofidagi tirik savdo — sonlar va pul birliklarini mustahkamlash uchun ideal. Rol o'ynab, ishonchli savdolashishni o'rganing.
description_ru: «Четыре пятьдесят — это же дорого?» — покупатель и продавец торгуются на рынке. В диалоге отрабатываются вопрос о цене, спор о качестве, просьба сбавить цену и подсчёт итоговой суммы. Живой торг вокруг помидоров, яиц и мяса — идеально для закрепления чисел и денежных единиц. Разыграйте по ролям и научитесь уверенно торговаться.
description_en: «Four-fifty is too expensive, isn't it?» — a shopper and vendor haggle at the market. The dialogue practices asking prices, arguing over quality, requesting a discount, and tallying the final total. Lively bargaining over tomatoes, eggs, and beef — ideal for drilling numbers and money words. Role-play it and learn to haggle with confidence.

sentences.text_translation_en: Boss, how much are the tomatoes?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 四块五一斤，今天早上刚到的，特别新鲜。
sentences.pinyin: Sì kuài wǔ yī jīn, jīntiān zǎoshang gāng dào de, tèbié xīnxiān.
sentences.text_translation: Yarim kilosi to'rt yuan-u besh mao, bugun ertalab kelgan, juda yangi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Четыре пятьдесят за полкило, сегодня утром только привезли, очень свежие.
sentences.text_translation_en: Four-fifty per half-kilo, they just arrived this morning, extra fresh.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 四块五太贵了吧？前面那家才卖三块八。
sentences.pinyin: Sì kuài wǔ tài guì le ba? Qiánmiàn nà jiā cái mài sān kuài bā.
sentences.text_translation: To'rt yuan-u besh mao qimmat-ku? Naridagi do'kon atigi uch yuan-u sakkiz maoga sotyapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Четыре пятьдесят — это же дорого? Вон та лавка впереди продаёт всего за три восемьдесят.
sentences.text_translation_en: Four-fifty is too expensive, isn't it? That stall up front only charges three-eighty.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 三块八的能跟我这个比吗？你看这颜色，红彤彤的，个个都熟透了。
sentences.pinyin: Sān kuài bā de néng gēn wǒ zhè ge bǐ ma? Nǐ kàn zhè yánsè, hóng tōng tōng de, gè gè dōu shú tòu le.
sentences.text_translation: Uch yuan-u sakkiz maolikni meningki bilan solishtirib bo'ladimi? Mana shu rangiga qara, qip-qizil, hammasi g'arq pishgan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Разве за три восемьдесят сравнятся с моими? Посмотри на цвет — ярко-красные, все полностью спелые.
sentences.text_translation_en: Can the three-eighty ones compare with mine? Look at this color — bright red, every one fully ripe.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 看着是不错，但还是有点贵。便宜点吧，三块五行不行？
sentences.pinyin: Kàn zhe shì búcuò, dàn háishì yǒu diǎn guì. Piányi diǎn ba, sān kuài wǔ xíng bù xíng?
sentences.text_translation: Ko'rinishidan yaxshi, lekin baribir biroz qimmat. Arzonroq qiling, uch yuan-u besh mao bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Выглядят и правда неплохо, но всё равно дороговато. Сделайте подешевле — три пятьдесят пойдёт?
sentences.text_translation_en: They look good, but it's still a bit pricey. Make it cheaper — would three-fifty work?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 三块五我真卖不了。这样，四块一斤，你要多少？
sentences.pinyin: Sān kuài wǔ wǒ zhēn mài bù liǎo. Zhèyàng, sì kuài yī jīn, nǐ yào duōshao?
sentences.text_translation: Uch yuan-u besh maoga rostdan sotolmayman. Mana shunday qilaylik, yarim kilosi to'rt yuan, qancha olasiz?
sentences.text_translation_ru: За три пятьдесят я правда не могу отдать. Давай так: четыре за полкило. Сколько тебе?
sentences.text_translation_en: I really can't sell at three-fifty. Tell you what — four per half-kilo. How much do you want?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 给我称两斤吧。对了，鸡蛋怎么卖？
sentences.pinyin: Gěi wǒ chēng liǎng jīn ba. Duìle, jīdàn zěnme mài?
sentences.text_translation: Bir kilo tortib bering. Aytgancha, tuxum qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Взвесьте мне килограмм. Кстати, почём яйца?
sentences.text_translation_en: Weigh me out a kilo. By the way, how much are the eggs?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 鸡蛋六块五一斤，土鸡蛋，比普通鸡蛋香。
sentences.pinyin: Jīdàn liù kuài wǔ yī jīn, tǔ jīdàn, bǐ pǔtōng jīdàn xiāng.
sentences.text_translation: Tuxum yarim kilosi olti yuan-u besh mao, qishloq tovuq tuxumi, oddiy tuxumdan mazaliroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Яйца шесть пятьдесят за полкило, деревенские, вкуснее обычных.
sentences.text_translation_en: Eggs are six-fifty per half-kilo, free-range, tastier than ordinary eggs.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 土鸡蛋确实好，但价格还是高了点。五块五行吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tǔ jīdàn quèshí hǎo, dàn jiàgé háishì gāo le diǎn. Wǔ kuài wǔ xíng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Qishloq tuxumi chindan ham yaxshi, lekin narxi baribir bir oz baland. Besh yuan-u besh mao bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Деревенские яйца и правда хорошие, но цена всё же высоковата. Пять пятьдесят можно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Free-range eggs really are good, but the price is still a bit high. Would five-fifty do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 五块五真的做不了。你要是买两斤，我给你算六块。
sentences.pinyin: Wǔ kuài wǔ zhēn de zuò bù liǎo. Nǐ yàoshi mǎi liǎng jīn, wǒ gěi nǐ suàn liù kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Besh yuan-u besh maoga rostdan bo'lmaydi. Agar bir kilo olsangiz, olti yuandan hisoblayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: За пять пятьдесят правда никак. Если возьмёшь килограмм, посчитаю по шесть.
sentences.text_translation_en: Five-fifty really isn't possible. If you buy a kilo, I'll count it as six.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 行，那就来两斤鸡蛋。牛肉怎么卖？
sentences.pinyin: Xíng, nà jiù lái liǎng jīn jīdàn. Niúròu zěnme mài?
sentences.text_translation: Mayli, unda bir kilo tuxum bering. Mol go'shti qancha turadi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, тогда давай килограмм яиц. А почём говядина?
sentences.text_translation_en: Alright, then a kilo of eggs. How much is the beef?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 牛肉四十五块一斤，今天早上新宰的，你看这肉多新鲜。
sentences.pinyin: Niúròu sìshíwǔ kuài yī jīn, jīntiān zǎoshang xīn zǎi de, nǐ kàn zhè ròu duō xīnxiān.
sentences.text_translation: Mol go'shti yarim kilosi qirq besh yuan, bugun ertalab yangi so'yilgan, mana shu go'shtning qanchalik yangiligiga qara.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Говядина сорок пять за полкило, сегодня утром свежезабитая, посмотри какое свежее мясо.
sentences.text_translation_en: Beef is forty-five per half-kilo, freshly slaughtered this morning — look how fresh this meat is.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我想买来做红烧牛肉，能不能便宜点？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi lái zuò hóngshāo niúròu, néng bùnéng piányi diǎn?
sentences.text_translation: Honshao mol go'shti qilish uchun olmoqchiman, arzonroq qilib bo'lmaydimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хочу купить для тушёной говядины, можно подешевле?
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to buy some to make braised beef — could you make it a bit cheaper?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 四十块吧，最低价了。你要多少？
sentences.pinyin: Sìshí kuài ba, zuì dī jià le. Nǐ yào duōshao?
sentences.text_translation: Qirq yuan bo'la qolsin, eng past narx. Qancha olasiz?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сорок, это самая низкая цена. Сколько тебе?
sentences.text_translation_en: Forty then, that's the lowest price. How much do you want?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Gěi wǒ qiē yī jīn bàn ba.
sentences.text_translation_en: Cut me a kilo and a quarter.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好嘞！西红柿两斤八块，鸡蛋两斤十二块，牛肉一斤半六十块，一共八十块。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo lei! Xīhóngshì liǎng jīn bā kuài, jīdàn liǎng jīn shí'èr kuài, niúròu yī jīn bàn liùshí kuài, yīgòng bāshí kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'pti! Pomidor bir kilo sakkiz yuan, tuxum bir kilo o'n ikki yuan, mol go'shti bir kilo-yu chorak oltmish yuan, jami sakson yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо! Помидоры килограмм — восемь, яйца килограмм — двенадцать, говядина полтора цзиня — шестьдесят, итого восемьдесят.
sentences.text_translation_en: Got it! Tomatoes a kilo — eight, eggs a kilo — twelve, beef a kilo and a quarter — sixty, eighty in total.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo lei! Xià cì zài lái a!
sentences.text_translation_en: Got it! Come again next time!
sentences.speaker: B
